ShortDescription.Value: Change Blue Color on everything to Any color / Any opacity. Surface tool QoL, turn preview layers off.

Publish.LongDescription:
### Mochi's Hover Colors
- Change the Blue outline color that has haunted every part of your city. - Any object you can hover over can change: all buildings, cars, cims, trees and more! - Guidelines - opacity slider for any transparency. - Surfaces: turn off the preview layers while in Surface tool so you can see the actual ground surface colors without a cloudy preview layer on top. - District tool: change color of district borders and overlays or turn them off completely.
- If you can hover over it then you can probably change it :) - Save safe, safe to remove anytime - No known compatibility issues. No Harmony patches.
## Important - Check the OPTIONS MENU For bulldozer settings - To turn off ALL Tooltips (click on the Info button top left) - only see it when you need it - Alpha setting is what makes things Transparent - it's the LAST bar on the color picker. - Tap preset 1 or 2 to switch colors - Change presets: select a color from main color picker, then HOLD preset button for 1 second (fill-bar will show save progress) - yes everything has Hotkeys - check options menu (tool tips on the right side has most of what you need to know)
### Feedback and Support
- Feedback is welcome through GitHub or Discord links on the right. - This mod took many months to overcome many obstacles in game code. - If you like the free mods made with love and lots of late night coffee, give a Like :)
### Credits - River-Mochi - modder/maintainer - Flashbond - collab, tech feedback, testing - yenyang - collab, tech feedback, testing - StarQ - tech feedback, testing - gagaxm - feature idea, testing - Dx, Necko1996, Noel, BugsyG, ElGendo87 - testing
12d+ Languages English, Français, Deutsch, Español, Italiano, Polski 简体中文 , 한국어, Português Brasil, 繁體中文 , 日本語 WIP: Thai ภาษาไทย, Vietnamese Tiếng Việt, Turlish Türkçe
Publish.ChangeLog: - add WIP Thai, Vietnamese, and Turkish locales. - update all translations files - Ui/Ux improvements for District tool and Presets glow
